title: Smoky Smoked Vegetable Stir-Fry
description: A comforting vegan-friendly Moroccan-inspired dish featuring smoked vegetables, garam masala, and a hint of smokiness for a light meal.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (optional)
ingredients.notes: such as parsley, cilantro for garnish

instructions: Place all vegetables in a steamer basket and steam until tender.
While the vegetables are steaming, heat vegan margarine or oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garam masala powder and smoked paprika to the heated pan and stir for about 30 seconds.
Once the spices are fragrant, add water or vegetable stock, salt, and pepper. Bring to a simmer.
Gently fold steamed vegetables into the sauce in the skillet, tossing until they’re coated evenly with the spice mixture.
Allow everything to cook together for another 2-3 minutes, then remove from heat.
If desired, garnish with fresh herbs.
